recommended_material: Modified PLA (MPLA) or High-Temperature PLA (e.g., Polymaker PLA Pro)

combi_hood.notes: Ensure good bed adhesion for large footprint.

fiberglass_grid.notes: Thin structural part, 100% infill recommended for rigidity.

filter_clamp.notes: Mechanical clamping part, higher infill for strength.

indoor_plate.notes: Large part, verify bed dimensions (min 250x250mm preferred).

custom_regions.notes: 100% infill required in the region where it goes around the pipe for mechanical strength.

regen.notes: Critical heat exchanger part. Must be printed with parallel channels (no top/bottom). Use Cura 'Lines' pattern.

ambiguities: Exact support blockers/enforcers for complex geometry not specified.
Optimal printing orientation for aerodynamic surfaces (e.g., noise splitter) is inferred but not confirmed.
Fan retention clamp screw hole tolerances depend on individual printer calibration.
